expectations.evidence: No overview table. Has a text-based 'Dependency Graph' at the bottom but not a structured task overview table
Tasks have 'Summary' and 'What to build' but no 'Context' section. Background information is minimal — no design decisions, no why, no bigger picture
All 6 tasks have 'Acceptance criteria' sections with bullet points
Tasks have 'Depends on' but not 'Blocks'. Missing the reverse dependency direction
Header references the spec file but no task punts context to 'see the spec'. Context is just thin, not deferred
Covers DB schema (T1), CRUD API (T2), queue/worker (T3), retry logic (T4), UI CRUD (T5), UI logs (T6)
No Goal line, no Task Overview table. Uses 'Summary/What to build/Depends on/Acceptance criteria' format instead of the template pattern
